message:
Command `# GPIO PASS! Now test SRAM (should also pass with value checks)
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
SOCGEN_TMP=".mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"
DESIGN_ROOT="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I"$SOCGEN_TMP/tb" \
  -DTEST_SEQ_SRAM \
  -f"$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f"$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o /tmp/sram_test.vvp 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "SRAM compile: $?"

timeout 30 /tmp/sram_test.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "SRAM_SEQ|PASS|FAIL|MISMATCH|SMOKE_SUMMARY"` executed with exit code 0.

# GPIO PASS! Now test SRAM (should also pass with value checks)
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
SOCGEN_TMP=".mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"
DESIGN_ROOT="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I"$SOCGEN_TMP/tb" \
  -DTEST_SEQ_SRAM \
  -f"$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f"$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o /tmp/sram_test.vvp 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "SRAM compile: $?"

timeout 30 /tmp/sram_test.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "SRAM_SEQ|PASS|FAIL|MISMATCH|SMOKE_SUMMARY"
